homePage.title: Home
homePage.description: Submit a subscription request to create a company account and start using the platform.

registerCompany.title: New company subscription request
registerCompany.description: This page is currently used to submit a request for creating a new company.

registerCompanyForm.tempNote: Temporary landing page for company subscription requests
registerCompanyForm.title: Create a new company
registerCompanyForm.description: Submit a request to create a new company and enable it to use the platform for shipment operations.

login.title: Login
login.description: Access your account to continue managing shipments and operations.

shipmentClientPage.title: Current order status and official tracking details
shipmentClientPage.description: A clear and organized view of the shipment status, route, and contact details in one page.

topSection.summary: Current route overview with shipment status and stop count.

timeline.title: Tracking timeline
timeline.description: Each station the shipment passes through, in order.
timeline.currentDescriptionWithNext: The shipment is here now, then heading to {nextPointName}.
timeline.currentDescriptionLast: The shipment has reached this station, and it is the last point in the route.
timeline.doneDescription: This station has been passed successfully.
timeline.upcomingDescription: The shipment has not reached this station yet.
